channel.title: Facebook pixel integration

item.title: Facebook pixel integration
item.dc:creator: bjornhalldor
item.description:
I’m currently dealing with the same issue.

Would be great if you could explain how you used Google Tag Manager for Facebook Pixel.

Are you using this package: @frontity/google-tag-manager-analytics - npm

Read full topic

item.title: Facebook pixel integration
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
alejandro:

I implemented FB pixel with Google Tag Manager which is linked to Frontity.

Awesome @alejandro!

Read full topic

item.title: Facebook pixel integration
item.dc:creator: alejandro
item.description:
Good morning Juanma, I solved my problem.

I implemented FB pixel with Google Tag Manager which is linked to Frontity.

Thanks for everything
Best regards

Read full topic

item.title: Facebook pixel integration
item.dc:creator: juanma
item.description:
Hi @alejandro ,

Can you please provide a repo or code-sandbox with your code? This is especially helpful to find solutions to technical issues with specific code

Detailing the info suggested here when having issues will help the community to provide the best possible help as quickly and as efficiently as possible.

Can you please provide more details about the error you’re getting and the steps you’ve followed to get them?

Read full topic

item.title: Facebook pixel integration
item.dc:creator: alejandro
item.description:
Hello,

I am having problems with the integration of Facebook pixel in our development.

It does not accept <noscript>.
Have you ever faced this problem?

<head>
    <script dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{
              __html: `!function (f, b, e, v, n, t, s) {
                  if (f.fbq) return; n = f.fbq = function () {
                    n.callMethod ?
                      n.callMethod.apply(n, arguments) : n.queue.push(arguments)
                  };
                  if (!f._fbq) f._fbq = n; n.push = n; n.loaded = !0; n.version = '2.0';
                  n.queue = []; t = b.createElement(e); t.async = !0;
                  t.src = v; s = b.getElementsByTagName(e)[0];
                  s.parentNode.insertBefore(t, s)
                }(window, document, 'script', 'https://connect.facebook.net/en_US/fbevents.js');
              fbq('init', '123266939');
              fbq('track', 'PageView');
              `}
            }
            />
            <noscript>
              <img height="1" width="1" style="display:none" src="https://www.facebook.com/tr?id=123266939&ev=PageView&noscript=1" />
            </noscript>
</head>

Can you tell me what I’m doing wrong?

Thank you very much
Best regards

Read full topic
